sessionStart.bash: if command -v aimhooman >/dev/null 2>&1; then aimhooman hook session-start; else exit 0; fi
sessionStart.powershell: if (Get-Command aimhooman -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & aimhooman hook session-start; exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { exit 0 }

preToolUse.bash: if command -v aimhooman >/dev/null 2>&1; then aimhooman hook pre-tool-use; else exit 0; fi
preToolUse.powershell: if (Get-Command aimhooman -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & aimhooman hook pre-tool-use; exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { exit 0 }
